subject: [PATCH v3 08/20] ext4: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations in the ext4 file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT() macro. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is a conversion to the new API. The macro wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper to finish previous mappings if needed and produce the next one. The patch affects two files: fs/ext4/extents.c and fs/ext4/inode.c, making 9 insertions and 3 deletions.
